response_text:
ENTITY Flight
PK flight_id
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_date : date
ATTR flight_number : varchar
ATTR airline_id : varchar
ATTR departure_airport_id : varchar
ATTR departure_location_id : varchar
ATTR arrival_airport_id : varchar
ATTR arrival_location_id : varchar
ATTR aircraft_id : varchar
ATTR status : varchar

ENTITY Location
PK location_id
ATTR location_id : varchar : PK
ATTR city_name : varchar

ENTITY Airport
PK airport_id
ATTR airport_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR location_id : varchar : FK

ENTITY Airline
PK airline_id
ATTR airline_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY Aircraft
PK aircraft_id
ATTR aircraft_id : varchar : PK
ATTR model : varchar

ENTITY CrewMember
PK crew_id
ATTR crew_id : varchar : PK
ATTR crew_name : varchar
ATTR crew_surname : varchar
ATTR role : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK status
ATTR status : varchar : PK

REL Flight -> Location : 1 -> 1 : FK=departure_location_id
REL Flight -> Location : 1 -> 1 : FK=arrival_location_id
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=departure_airport_id
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=arrival_airport_id
REL Flight -> Airline : 1 -> 1 : FK=airline_id
REL Flight -> Aircraft : 1 -> 1 : FK=aircraft_id
REL Flight -> FlightStatus : 1 -> 1 : FK=status
REL Flight -> CrewMember : 0..N -> 1 : FK=crew_id
